# Design-to-Plan Cross-Review Summary

*Generated by stark-design-to-plan | 2026-03-28*

## Scorecard

```
              Complete  Feasible    Avg
  codex         8.5       8.0      8.4 *
  claude        7.5       6.5      6.9
```

**Winner: codex (8.4/10)**

| Agent | Duration | Lines | Status |

## Per-Plan Assessment

**Codex (winner — 8.4):**
- 6 phases with explicit prerequisites, repo-anchored file paths, function signatures
- Strong integration contracts section linking producers to consumers
- Weakness: Python utilities in CCR (triggers can't run local scripts), empty prompt shells in Phase 2

**Claude (6.9):**
- Clear phase naming ("Foundation", "Proof of Pattern", "Health Fleet")
- ~45 tasks with measurable acceptance criteria per task
- Strong phasing: auto-monitor before high-cost triggers
- Weakness: feasibility concerns around template complexity

**Gemini (6.3):**
- Correctly identified parallel phasing opportunities
- Front-loaded PAT/branch-protection as highest-risk unknowns
- Weakness: lower specificity, fewer concrete commands and file paths

## Synthesis Decisions

| Element | Source | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| Overall structure (6 phases) | Codex | Most complete and verifiable |
| Phase naming | Claude | Clearer intent communication |
| Acceptance criteria style | Claude | Measurable "done when" per task |
| Integration contracts table | Codex | Essential for fleet health |
| Prerequisites section | Codex + Claude | Merged: Codex's PAT scope check + Claude's Slack channel |
| Weekly trigger soak period | Cross-review feedback | 24h soak insufficient for weekly triggers; use 2 cycles |
| Local tooling separation | Cross-review feedback | Clarified that CCR triggers don't import Python scripts |
| Dedupe label creation | Cross-review feedback | Added as Phase 1 task (missing from all 3 plans) |
| Risk register | Claude | Most structured risk analysis |

## Metrics

- Total duration: ~16m

- Reviews completed: 6/6 (gemini→claude had CLI error but still returned)

- Runner-up: claude (6.9/10)
- Synthesis merges: 6 elements from non-winner plans
